---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(magick)
library(dplyr)
library(hexSticker)
```

```{r}
img <- image_read("Drifloon.png")

img %>% 
  image_resize("1080 x 200")%>% 
  image_fill(color="#e70096", point="+45") -> res
res
```

```{r}
final_res<-sticker(res, package="Drifloon", p_size=26,
             p_y = 1.5,
             s_x=1, s_y=0.8, s_width=1.1,
             s_height = 14,
        filename="drifloon_hex.png",h_fill="#e70096",
        h_color = "#ff396c",
        h_size = 1.4)

plot(final_res)
```
